pages.text: Value selectors share one control grammar: $(thing)left-click$() goes to the next value, $(thing)right-click$() goes to the previous value, wheel down or up moves next or previous while hovered, and $(thing)middle-click$() resets the selector.
Reset defaults are Name sort, Ascending order, Search Sync Off, Items resource view, $(thing)Auto target$(), and Player craft output. Auto Focus is a separate on/off control and starts enabled.

Sorting offers $(thing)Name, Quantity, Mod, and ID$(). Type names normally, or begin a term with $(thing)@mod$() or $(thing)#tag$(). Auto Focus sends keyboard input to Search as soon as a terminal opens. Search Sync separately offers Off, terminal-to-EMI, and EMI two-way.

A colored light means a true on/off control such as Auto Focus or Use Player Inventory. Resource view, sort, Search Sync, Fuel Target, and Craft Output are selected values, so they use labels or icons instead. The active page uses a neutral selected-tab frame.

Your Auto Focus choice, sort, order, Search Sync mode, resource view, Crafting tab, ingredient source, output destination, and Fuel Target are remembered for every terminal on this Minecraft client. Search text, scroll position, and selected recipes reset when the screen closes.
